listings.title: Duplex for rent in Rue Murillo 38 Brussels (VBE15126)
listings.fit_summary: Exact budget floor, fully furnished, true long-term lease, and strong Merode/Schuman location for a workable 3-person 2br setup.
listings.concerns: Only 74 m² and 2 bedrooms; immediate start rather than August/September.

listings.title: Apartment for rent in Boulevard d'Ypres Brussels (VBE14984)
listings.fit_summary: Low total rent, furnished renovation, terrace, and central Sainte-Catherine access make this a compelling 2br exception for 3 people.
listings.concerns: Only 2 bedrooms; July start rather than September; listing text is partly AI-generated.

listings.title: Penthouse for rent in RUE STEVIN 14 Brussels (VBE14209)
listings.fit_summary: Large 140 m² furnished duplex penthouse with terrace in the EU district; roomy enough to merit 3-person review despite being 2br.
listings.concerns: Only 2 bedrooms and the listing does not state an availability date.

listings.title: Apartment for rent in Rue d'Arenberg Brussels (VBE15499)
listings.fit_summary: Very central furnished 2br near Central Station and Grand-Place at a strong price point for a practical shared setup.
listings.concerns: Only 2 bedrooms; utilities are separate; no size surfaced in the extracted detail page.

listings.title: Apartment for rent in Rue de l'Ecuyer 32 Brussels (VBE14024)
listings.fit_summary: Spacious 114 m² furnished central apartment with terrace and explicit 1-year renewable lease, still within budget per person.
listings.concerns: Only 2 bedrooms, near the top of budget, and no explicit availability date shown.
